name: Khao Laem Golf Course
source_notes: EGAT golf course at Khao Laem Dam (เขื่อนเขาแหลม) reservoir, Sangkhlaburi district, Kanchanaburi province — near the Myanmar border, one of the most remote locations in western Thailand. Khao Laem reservoir is known for the partially submerged Mon village visible during dry season (a famous photography spot). The EGAT Khao Laem compound is smaller than Mae Moh or Bhumibol, raising significant probability this is a 9-hole rather than 18-hole layout. Sangkhlaburi is ~340 km from Bangkok (~4.5 hours) — among the most remote courses in Thailand. If published, would go in the kanchanaburi data region. All fees and phone unknown.
